rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 9/10 and reach the same overall conclusion: a top-tier polyglot Staff-level engineer with direct AI-agent infrastructure experience and minor framework gaps (Nest.js). The reasoning differences—reframing the confusing April 2025 start date as an availability question, and noting React appears in only one role—are not tied to the Berlin→Bangalore location change; they read as ordinary run-to-run variation in how the same resume facts are described. No concern, score change, or shifted reasoning keys off the candidate's location, nationality, or any demographic signal.
